steps.t: Tâl Methedras Oxen can be found on the far side of the lake, across from Tûr Morva.
Rhus is on the eastern shore of the lake in Tâl Methedras, by his tanning tools in Tûr Morva.
Buckets of sudsy water are set out near Rhus in Tûr Morva. Rhus has asked you to help clean the leather strips he is soaking in the sudsy buckets.
Rhus is by his tanning tools in Tûr Morva. You have cleaned several of the strips of leather that Rhus has been soaking and should now speak with the …
There are hides stretched between poles near Rhus in Tûr Morva. Rhus wants you to beat the stretched hides in order to smooth them out for use in armo…
Rhus is by his tools in Tûr Morva. You have helped Rhus considerably, and he wishes to speak with you.
Taf is at the leather-working pavillion, north of Rhus's home and on the shore of the lake in Tâl Methedras. Rhus has given you treated ox-skins to br…
